description_long: This is a large, rounded barrel or lidded basket with a woven wicker texture, featuring a tightly fitted circular lid with a small knob handle on top. The body is bulbous, tapering slightly at the base and neck, and displays a consistent, intricate weave pattern typical of natural wicker or rattan. The coloration is a light beige with subtle variations, mimicking the look of sun-bleached or lightly finished plant fibers. The lid appears to be removable and is crafted in the same woven style, seamlessly matching the body. There are no visible handles or external reinforcements, giving the object a clean, uninterrupted silhouette. The object is likely hollow and intended for storage, making it suitable for use as a decorative or functional receptacle in urban or domestic settings.
description: A large, rounded wicker barrel or lidded basket with a woven texture and a matching removable lid. Light beige in color, it features a smooth, seamless design without visible handles or reinforcements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded wicker body and the circular lid with a small knob handle, weave pattern is clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the side curvature and the consistent woven texture, lid and knob remain prominent.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features, showing the smooth transition between the body and the lid, weave pattern remains uniform.
description_view_3: Another side view, highlighting the bulbous shape and the seamless appearance of the woven wicker, lid and knob are visible.
